Class UpdateBuilder<T>

java.lang.Object
com.hogwai.dynamodb.simplified.builder.UpdateBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the item
public class UpdateBuilder<T> extends Object
A fluent builder for updating an item in a DynamoDB table. Supports both full-item replacement and partial updates via an UpdateExpression. Part of the DynamoDB Simplified library.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UpdateBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull T item, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
    Constructs a new UpdateBuilder for the given table and item.
    UpdateBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey)
    Key-only constructor for use from Table convenience methods.

  • Constructor Details

    • UpdateBuilder

      public UpdateBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull T item, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient)
      Constructs a new UpdateBuilder for the given table and item.
      Parameters:
      table - the DynamoDB table
      item - the item to update (full replacement data, or a template object when used with update(Consumer))
      dynamoDbClient - the low-level DynamoDB client (required for partial updates)

    • UpdateBuilder

      public UpdateBuilder(@NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.enhanced.dynamodb.DynamoDbTable<T> table, @NonNull software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.DynamoDbClient dynamoDbClient, @NonNull Object partitionKey, @Nullable Object sortKey)
      Key-only constructor for use from Table convenience methods. Skips the item parameter and builds the key map directly from partition (and optionally sort) key values.

  • Method Details

    • update

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> update(@NonNull Consumer<UpdateExpression> updateBuilder)
      Defines a partial update expression (SET, REMOVE, ADD, DELETE). When set, this replaces the full-item replacement with a targeted partial update.
      Parameters:
      updateBuilder - a consumer that configures the UpdateExpression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> condition(@NonNull Consumer<ConditionExpression.Builder> configurator)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the update operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before updating the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      configurator - a consumer to build the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • condition

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> condition(@Nullable ConditionExpression condition)
      Configures a condition expression that gates the update operation. DynamoDB evaluates this condition before updating the item (unlike a filter expression which applies after reading).
      Parameters:
      condition - the condition expression
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • ignoreNulls

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> ignoreNulls(boolean ignoreNulls)
      Controls whether null-valued attributes in the item are ignored during full-item replacement. Has no effect when using a partial update expression.
      Parameters:
      ignoreNulls - true (default) to skip null attributes, false to persist them
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • returnValues

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> returnValues(@Nullable software.amazon.awssdk.services.dynamodb.model.ReturnValue returnValues)
      Configures which item attributes to return after the update.

      When set, controls the ReturnValues parameter of the underlying UpdateItemRequest. Common values: ReturnValue.ALL_NEW (default if not set), ReturnValue.NONE, ReturnValue.ALL_OLD, ReturnValue.UPDATED_NEW, ReturnValue.UPDATED_OLD.

      Parameters:
      returnValues - the return value setting, or null to use the default
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withOptimisticLocking

      public @NonNull UpdateBuilder<T> withOptimisticLocking()
      Enables optimistic locking for this update operation.

      When enabled, the library adds a condition expression checking that the version attribute hasn't changed, and increments the version on success. The item must implement Versioned.

      This is only supported for full-item replacement. For partial updates (update(Consumer)), the item must be provided in the constructor.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • execute

      public @NonNull Optional<T> execute()
      Executes the update operation. If a partial update expression was configured via update(Consumer), a targeted partial update is performed via the low-level DynamoDB client. Otherwise, the full item is replaced.
      Returns:
      the updated item, or empty if not found
